firstDialogue:
Newspaper:
'They will know my name' (Ignore this line, it doesn't work and I genuinely don't know why)

Newspaper:
This was the phrase that was found spray painted onto multiple areas throughout the city

Newspaper:
ever since the disappearances started happening.

Newspaper:
Though the individual who left these messages is still unknown,

Newspaper:
we can only infer that they have something to do with the missing people.

Newspaper:
As of now, three more people have gone missing.

Newspaper:
Melody Pop, Octavio Crescendo, and Harmony Legato.

Detective Rhythm:
More missing people again?

Detective Rhythm:
This can’t keep happening. Whoever is doing this needs to be stopped.

Detective Rhythm:
There has to be something I can do.

Detective Rhythm:
Detective Rhythm is on the case!
repeatDialogue: Use the WASD keys to move around and the E key to interact with objects.
Use your skills with the arrow keys to undaze citizens and gather information. Pay attention to their responses, as they may hold clues to the mystery.
